translation_notes: Approximated short white candle as body < ATR_14 (small body relative to volatility). Entry logic checks candle size and position relative to 50-day MA to determine direction. Exit on candle color reversal (close crossing previous close). Author-silent parameters for success rates, volume trends, and throwback percentages cannot be operationalized without original source data.
